calendar.matters:
Progress Report On The Establishment Of The Coogan Account(S) For The Benefit Of The Minor, William Lewis
Off Calendar May-12-2022 Off Calendar

Progress Report On The Establishment Of The Coogan Account(S) For The Benefit Of The Minor, William Lewis
Off Calendar Feb-10-2022 Continued To May-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Minor'S Employment Contract {Family Law Code Section 6751, Et Seq}
Off Calendar Jan-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition for Approval of the Employment Contract for the Minor, William Lewis.
Dept. 514. Judge: Garrett L. Wong. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:43 a.m.

Bruce D. Eisen, Esq. appeared for petitioner Outerlands Productions LLC.
Nicolle Foland, Managing Director for petitioner Outerlands Productions LLC, was placed under oath, but did not testify.
Jessica Turner was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, William Lewis, who was also present.
Ms. Turner and Mr. Lewis were placed under oath, but did not testify.
Order appointing Jessica Turner Guardian ad Litem for the minor, William Lewis, was filed January 5, 2022.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules as follows:

(1) The Contract is approved as to all of the terms and conditions set forth therein;

(2) Petitioner is ORDERED to deduct, until the minor attains the age of eighteen years, fifteen percent (15%) of the gross earnings payable by petitioner to and/or for the services of the minor pursuant to the Contract, and to deposit said fifteen percent (15%) into one or more Coogan Trust Accounts establised and maintained for the benefit of the minor at one or more financial institutions in the State of California in accordance with California Family Code Section 6753;

(3) Said Coogan Trust Account(s) shall name the minor's parent(s) or legal guardian(s) as trustee(s) for the benefit of the minor; and

(4) Except as provided in California Family Code Section 6753 (as amended effective January 1, 2004), there shall be no withdrawals of funds on deposit in said Coogan Trust Account(s) to minor William Lewis until he (William Lewis) attains the age of eighteen (18) years on April 8, 2022, or until further ORDER of this Court, whichever shall first occur.

Matter is CONTINUED to February 10, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the establishment and funding the Coogan Trust Account(s).

Counsel for petitioner shall prepare the proposed Order Approving the Contract of the Minor and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 9:49 a.m.
Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Employment Contract For The Minor, William Lewis

PETITION
